name: libfile-dirlist-perl
title: libfile-dirlist-perl
summary: provide a sorted list of directory content
description:
provide a sorted list of directory content
File::DirList is used to get a list of directory content. It is a simple
wrapper around DirHandle and sort().
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libfile-dirlist-perl because provide a sorted list of directory content.

When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libfile-dirlist-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libfile-dirlist-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
